name: Baken Tuna Salad Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain oil from tuna into a skillet.
2. Add onions, celery, and peppers; sauté until soft.
3. Add tuna and toss to mix. Set aside.
4. Spread bread slices with mayonnaise and cut into small cubes.
5. In a 1 1/2 quart casserole, arrange layers of half bread cubes, half tuna mixture, and half cheese.
6. Repeat using the remainder.
7. Combine eggs with milk.
8. Stir in tomato sauce gradually and salt.
9. Mix well.
10. Pour over the casserole, gently pressing to ensure all ingredients are immersed.
11. Let stand for 10 minutes.
12. Bake at 350°F until golden brown and puffy.
